note: SOST PQ V3 witness prototype vectors. Fixed 2-byte big-endian length prefixes. NOT consensus. Component payload bytes are placeholder fill bytes (not real signatures). See prototype/pq/pq_witness.h.

format.layout: alg_id(1) then per component: len_be16(2) + bytes[len]. No trailing bytes allowed.

canonical_len_be16_prefixes_hex.note: The exactly-2-byte unsigned big-endian length prefix for each component. No CompactSize/varint. ML-DSA-65/87 are RESERVED (rejected by alg_id); their prefixes are shown for completeness only.

valid.name: ml_dsa_44
valid.hex: (2420-byte sig + 1312-byte pk; too large to inline — generate via serialize_witness)

valid.name: hybrid_ecdsa_ml_dsa_44
valid.hex: (64+33 ECDSA half then 2420+1312 ML-DSA half — generate via serialize_witness)

invalid.name: little_endian_length
invalid.note: sig length 64 written little-endian (40 00); BE16 decode = 0x4000 = 16384 != 64.

invalid.name: one_byte_prefix
invalid.note: sig length written as a single byte (40); parser still reads two bytes (40 11 = 0x4011).

invalid.name: compactsize_prefix_ml_dsa
invalid.note: CompactSize(2420)=FD 74 09 for ML-DSA-44 sig; BE16 reads FD 74 = 0xFD74 = 64884 != 2420. CompactSize is not a recognised encoding.

invalid.name: fd_lead_not_varint
invalid.note: 0xFD is the high byte of a BE16 length (0xFD00 = 64768), never a varint marker.

invalid.name: correct_len_truncated_data
invalid.note: sig length correctly declared 64 (0040) but only 30 sig bytes follow.

invalid.name: wrong_len_65_enough_data
invalid.note: sig length declared 65 (0041) with more than enough bytes present; rejected before reading.
